disagreement.question: In what year was Museu da Misericórdia founded?
disagreement.response_b:
**Museu da Misericórdia de Salvador (Bahia, Brazil) was founded in 2008.**

It was officially inaugurated on January 24, 2008, as part of the celebrations for the 500th anniversary of the Santa Casa de Misericórdia da Bahia (founded in 1549). The museum is housed in the historic headquarters of the Misericórdia and displays a valuable collection of sacred art, furniture, and documents spanning over 450 years.

disagreement.question: In what year was Lambert Bridge opened?
disagreement.response_b:
**1970**

disagreement.question: In what year was the journal Doklady Vsesoyuznoi Akademii Sel’skokhozyaistvennykh Nauk imeni V. I. Lenina first published?
